name: Maple Fudge (Lathrop)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and sugar in a saucepan.
2. Add maple syrup, corn syrup, and milk to the saucepan. Stir occasionally until it reaches a soft ball stage (232-236 degrees).
3. Remove from heat and drop butter on top of the mixture.
4. Cool to lukewarm; beat until glossy look begins to form.
5. Quickly pour into a buttered pan.
